name: Minimum master bedroom area
description: Master bedroom shall have a minimum floor area of 10.5 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area for master bedroom 10.5 square metres Nepal building code NBC 2020

name: Minimum bedroom area
description: Each bedroom (other than master) shall have a minimum floor area of 9.5 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area for bedroom 9.5 square metres Nepal building code

name: Minimum living room area
description: Living room (sitting room) shall have a minimum floor area of 11.15 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area for living room sitting room 11.15 square metres Nepal

name: Minimum dining room area
description: Dining room shall have a minimum floor area of 7.0 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area dining room 7 square metres Nepal NBC

name: Minimum kitchen area
description: Kitchen shall have a minimum floor area of 5.0 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area kitchen 5 square metres Nepal building code

name: Minimum bathroom (combined) area
description: Combined bathroom (WC + shower/bath) shall have a minimum floor area of 2.5 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area bathroom combined toilet shower 2.5 sqm Nepal

name: Minimum separate toilet area
description: Separate WC (toilet only) shall have a minimum floor area of 1.2 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area separate toilet WC 1.2 sqm Nepal NBC

name: Minimum storeroom area
description: Storeroom/utility room shall have a minimum floor area of 2.0 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area storeroom utility 2 sqm Nepal building code

name: Minimum home office area
description: Home office / study room should have a minimum floor area of 7.5 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area home office study room 7.5 sqm Nepal NBC 2020

name: Minimum pooja room area
description: Pooja room / prayer room should have a minimum floor area of 1.5 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area pooja room prayer room 1.5 sqm Nepal

name: Minimum garage area (single car)
description: Single-car garage shall have a minimum floor area of 13.0 sqm (2.7m × 4.8m).
embedding_text: minimum area single car garage parking 13 sqm Nepal building code

name: Minimum staircase area
description: Staircase well shall have a minimum floor area of 4.5 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum area staircase stairwell 4.5 sqm Nepal NBC

name: Minimum habitable room shorter dimension
description: Any habitable room (bedroom, living, kitchen, dining) shall have a minimum dimension of 2.4 m on the shorter side.
embedding_text: minimum dimension habitable room 2.4 metres shorter side Nepal NBC 2020

name: Minimum master bedroom shorter dimension
description: Master bedroom shall have a minimum dimension of 3.0 m on the shorter side.
embedding_text: minimum width master bedroom 3 metres Nepal building code

name: Minimum bedroom shorter dimension
description: Bedroom shall have a minimum dimension of 2.7 m on the shorter side.
embedding_text: minimum width bedroom 2.7 metres Nepal NBC 2020

name: Minimum corridor width
description: Internal corridor / passage shall have a minimum clear width of 0.9 m.
embedding_text: minimum corridor passage width 0.9 metres Nepal building code

name: Front setback — road width < 6 m
description: Front setback from road boundary shall be minimum 1.5 m when fronting road is less than 6 m wide.
embedding_text: front setback 1.5 metres narrow road less than 6m Kathmandu

name: Front setback — road width 6–8 m
description: Front setback from road boundary shall be minimum 1.5 m when fronting road is 6–8 m wide.
embedding_text: front setback 1.5 metres road 6 to 8 metres wide Kathmandu building bylaw

name: Front setback — road width 8–11 m
description: Front setback from road boundary shall be minimum 2.0 m when fronting road is 8–11 m wide.
embedding_text: front setback 2 metres road width 8 to 11 metres Kathmandu NBC

name: Front setback — road width 11–15 m
description: Front setback from road boundary shall be minimum 3.0 m when fronting road is 11–15 m wide.
embedding_text: front setback 3 metres road width 11 to 15 metres Kathmandu bylaw

name: Front setback — road width > 15 m
description: Front setback from road boundary shall be minimum 4.5 m when fronting road exceeds 15 m.
embedding_text: front setback 4.5 metres wide road more than 15 metres Kathmandu Nepal

name: Rear setback — plot > 100 sqm
description: Rear setback shall be minimum 1.5 m for plots larger than 100 sqm.
embedding_text: rear setback 1.5 metres plot area more than 100 sqm Kathmandu

name: Side setback — building ≤ 3 floors
description: Each side setback shall be minimum 1.0 m for buildings up to 3 floors.
embedding_text: side setback 1 metre each side building 3 floors Kathmandu Nepal

name: Side setback — building 4+ floors
description: Each side setback shall be minimum 1.5 m for buildings 4 or more floors.
embedding_text: side setback 1.5 metres each side building 4 or more floors Kathmandu

name: Maximum ground coverage — residential
description: Total ground floor footprint shall not exceed 60% of the plot area for residential buildings.
embedding_text: maximum ground coverage 60 percent residential plot area Kathmandu Nepal

name: Minimum open / green area
description: At least 40% of the plot area should remain as open or green space.
embedding_text: minimum open green space 40 percent plot area Kathmandu building bylaw

name: Maximum FAR — road < 6 m
description: Floor Area Ratio (total built-up area / plot area) shall not exceed 1.5 for roads less than 6 m wide.
embedding_text: maximum floor area ratio FAR 1.5 narrow road less than 6 metres Kathmandu Nepal

name: Maximum FAR — road 6–8 m
description: Floor Area Ratio shall not exceed 2.0 for roads 6–8 m wide.
embedding_text: maximum FAR floor area ratio 2.0 road 6 to 8 metres Kathmandu Nepal

name: Maximum FAR — road 8–11 m
description: Floor Area Ratio shall not exceed 2.5 for roads 8–11 m wide.
embedding_text: maximum FAR 2.5 road 8 to 11 metres wide Kathmandu building bylaw

name: Maximum FAR — road 11–15 m
description: Floor Area Ratio shall not exceed 3.0 for roads 11–15 m wide.
embedding_text: maximum FAR 3.0 road 11 to 15 metres Kathmandu Nepal bylaw

name: Maximum FAR — road > 15 m
description: Floor Area Ratio shall not exceed 3.5 for roads wider than 15 m.
embedding_text: maximum FAR 3.5 wide road more than 15 metres Kathmandu Nepal

name: Minimum habitable room floor-to-ceiling height
description: Habitable rooms (bedroom, living, kitchen, dining) shall have a minimum floor-to-ceiling height of 2.6 m.
embedding_text: minimum floor ceiling height habitable room 2.6 metres Nepal NBC 2020

name: Minimum bathroom/toilet floor-to-ceiling height
description: Bathrooms and toilets shall have a minimum floor-to-ceiling height of 2.2 m.
embedding_text: minimum ceiling height bathroom toilet 2.2 metres Nepal building code

name: Maximum building height relative to road width
description: Building height H shall not exceed (road width W + front setback S): H ≤ W + S. Checked by planner; not auto-enforceable from floor plan alone.
embedding_text: maximum building height road width setback Kathmandu Nepal

name: Minimum window area for habitable rooms
description: Total window area in a habitable room shall be at least 10% of the floor area of that room.
embedding_text: minimum window area 10 percent floor area habitable room Nepal NBC 2020

name: Minimum ventilation opening for habitable rooms
description: Net ventilation opening area shall be at least 5% of the floor area of a habitable room.
embedding_text: minimum ventilation opening 5 percent floor area habitable room Nepal

name: Minimum main entrance door width
description: Main entrance door clear width shall be minimum 0.9 m.
embedding_text: minimum main entrance door width 0.9 metres Nepal NBC 2020

name: Minimum internal door width
description: Internal room doors shall have a clear width of minimum 0.75 m.
embedding_text: minimum internal door width 0.75 metres Nepal building code

name: Minimum bathroom/toilet door width
description: Bathroom and toilet doors shall have a clear width of minimum 0.6 m.
embedding_text: minimum bathroom toilet door width 0.6 metres Nepal NBC

name: Minimum staircase clear width
description: Staircase shall have a minimum clear width of 0.9 m.
embedding_text: minimum staircase width 0.9 metres Nepal NBC 2020 residential

name: Maximum stair riser height
description: Maximum individual riser height shall be 0.18 m (180 mm).
embedding_text: maximum stair riser height 180mm 0.18 metres Nepal building code

name: Minimum stair tread depth
description: Minimum tread depth (going) shall be 0.25 m (250 mm).
embedding_text: minimum stair tread depth going 250mm 0.25 metres Nepal NBC 2020

name: Minimum staircase headroom
description: Minimum vertical headroom clearance above any stair tread shall be 2.1 m.
embedding_text: minimum headroom clearance staircase 2.1 metres Nepal building code

name: Kitchen shall not be adjacent to toilet
description: Kitchen should not share a wall directly with a toilet or bathroom due to hygiene and ventilation concerns.
embedding_text: kitchen should not be adjacent to toilet bathroom hygiene Nepal NBC 2020

name: Kitchen accessible from dining room
description: Kitchen should be directly accessible from the dining room or combined living-dining area.
embedding_text: kitchen accessible from dining room living area direct access Nepal

name: Bathroom accessible from master bedroom
description: An en-suite bathroom should be accessible directly from the master bedroom.
embedding_text: ensuite bathroom adjacent accessible from master bedroom Nepal residential design

name: Kitchen exhaust / ventilation duct
description: Kitchen shall have mechanical exhaust or a dedicated ventilation duct to outside. Minimum duct area: 0.037 sqm.
embedding_text: kitchen exhaust ventilation duct minimum area Nepal NBC 2020 residential

name: Bathroom/toilet exhaust ventilation
description: Bathrooms and toilets without external windows shall have mechanical exhaust ventilation.
embedding_text: bathroom toilet exhaust ventilation no window internal Nepal NBC

name: Minimum column size — up to 3 floors
description: Reinforced concrete columns for buildings up to 3 floors shall have minimum cross-section of 230mm × 230mm.
embedding_text: minimum column size 230mm reinforced concrete 3 floors Nepal NBC seismic zone

name: Minimum column size — 4+ floors
description: Reinforced concrete columns for buildings 4 floors or more shall have minimum cross-section of 300mm × 300mm.
embedding_text: minimum column size 300mm reinforced concrete 4 floors and above Nepal NBC seismic

name: Seismic Zone V enhanced structural requirements
description: Kathmandu is in Seismic Zone V (very high hazard). All structural elements must comply with IS 1893 Part 1 for Zone V. Enhanced ductile detailing required for all RC frames.
embedding_text: seismic zone V Kathmandu Nepal enhanced structural ductile detailing NBC 105 earthquake

name: Master bedroom — southwest quadrant
description: According to Vastu Shastra, the master bedroom should be placed in the southwest quadrant of the building, associated with stability and health.
embedding_text: vastu master bedroom southwest direction placement Nepal Hindu architecture

name: Kitchen — southeast quadrant
description: According to Vastu Shastra, the kitchen should be placed in the southeast quadrant (Agni corner — fire element).
embedding_text: vastu kitchen southeast direction agni fire corner Nepal Hindu

name: Pooja room — northeast quadrant
description: Pooja room / prayer room should be in the northeast quadrant (Ishaan corner — auspicious).
embedding_text: vastu pooja room prayer northeast ishaan corner Nepal Hindu architecture

name: Living room — north or northeast
description: Living room should be placed in the north or northeast quadrant for positive energy flow.
embedding_text: vastu living room north northeast direction placement Nepal Vastu Shastra

name: Staircase — south or southwest
description: Staircase should be placed in the south or southwest area of the building.
embedding_text: vastu staircase south southwest placement Nepal Hindu architecture design

name: Main entrance — east or north preferred
description: Main entrance should face east, north, or northeast for maximum positive energy and natural light.
embedding_text: vastu main entrance east north northeast facing Nepal Hindu architecture

name: Toilet/WC — south or southeast, not northeast
description: Toilet and WC should NOT be in the northeast (Ishaan) corner. South or southeast placement is preferred.
embedding_text: vastu toilet bathroom not northeast south southeast preferred Nepal Hindu

name: Garage — southeast or northwest
description: Garage or car parking should be in the southeast or northwest area of the plot.
embedding_text: vastu garage parking southeast northwest Nepal Hindu architecture

name: Accessible main entrance width
description: For buildings with universal design requirements, main entrance door shall be minimum 1.0 m clear width to allow wheelchair access.
embedding_text: accessible main door 1 metre wide wheelchair access Nepal NBC 206

name: Ramp gradient for wheelchair access
description: Ramps for wheelchair access should not exceed 1:12 gradient (8.3%). Preferred gradient is 1:20.
embedding_text: ramp gradient wheelchair access 1 in 12 Nepal accessibility standard NBC 206
